vault.default_greeting: Oh, a visitor! We don't get many from outside.

idle: The water chip's acting up again.
The rules are there for a reason.

rank_greetings.Idolized: It's you! The whole vault talks about your deeds. What can we do for you?
rank_greetings.Admired: Welcome back, friend of the vault. The Overseer speaks highly of you.
rank_greetings.Liked: Good to see a friendly face. What brings you to our vault?
rank_greetings.Accepted: You're welcome here. Just... follow the rules.
rank_greetings.Neutral: Oh, a visitor! We don't get many from outside.
rank_greetings.Shunned: I've heard things about you. Stay out of trouble.
rank_greetings.Disliked: You're causing problems for everyone. Please leave.
rank_greetings.Hated: Get out of our vault. You're not welcome here.

start.text: Oh, a visitor! We don't get many from outside. The Overseer keeps things... regulated.

about.text: We've been here since the bombs fell. The Overseer keeps us safe, keeps us organized. Not everyone agrees with his methods, but... it works.

outside.text: The outside world is dangerous. Raiders, mutants, the Legion... Some of us dream of leaving, but the Overseer says it's suicide.

work.text: The Overseer might have tasks for outsiders. He's usually in his office. Just... be respectful.

supplies.text: We're low on everything. The quartermaster might spare something for the right price... or if you can help us out.

needs.text: Medicine, water chips, ammunition for security. If you find any of those in your travels, bring them back. The vault rewards its friends.

end.text: Stay safe out there. And remember - vault rules apply even to visitors.

vault_security.default_greeting: State your business. This is a secure area.

rank_greetings.Idolized: Sir! It's an honor. Let me know if you need anything.
rank_greetings.Admired: Welcome back. You have full clearance.
rank_greetings.Liked: Good to see you. Stay out of restricted areas.
rank_greetings.Accepted: You're cleared for entry. Behave yourself.
rank_greetings.Neutral: State your business. This is a secure area.
rank_greetings.Shunned: I'm watching you. One wrong move...

start.text: State your business. This is a secure area.

visit.text: Keep your hands visible and follow the rules. We don't tolerate troublemakers.

work.text: Security positions are for vault residents only. But if you want to help... we could use intel on outside threats.

threats.text: Raiders sometimes probe our perimeter. The Legion is far, but they have spies everywhere. Stay vigilant.
